meta.name: Trading Bot UI Design Spec

source.basis: Visual inspection plus current frontend implementation

meta.intent: Document the existing app's look, feel, UI system, interaction patterns, and notable inconsistencies so the current design can be preserved or evolved deliberately.

design_direction.summary: A dark crypto-dashboard aesthetic built around frosted panels, electric cyan accents, mono numeric readouts, and live-data terminal cues.

personality.energy: Calm at rest, vivid on interaction
personality.trust_signal: Dense data presentation with clear semantic color coding
personality.emotional_read: Feels like an operator console rather than a consumer finance app

design_direction.memorability: The most distinctive element is the bright cyan glow language against a near-black background, especially in pill tabs, status badges, live indicators, and the persistent activity timeline.

brand.brand_impression: Automation-first, data-driven, modern, machine-assisted trading tool

palette_roles.primary_action: Cyan to blue gradient or cyan outline/glow

usage_notes: Cyan is the dominant accent and carries navigation, active state, live state, and primary action meaning.
Green and red are reserved mostly for market semantics and status feedback.
The background never becomes flat black because of subtle radial glow and layered translucent panels.
Small colored timeline dots and type badges add semantic scanning in the activity log.

glow_language.purpose: Used to create a live-terminal feeling without filling the interface with heavy gradients

primary_font.impression: Rounded geometric sans that keeps the dashboard modern and readable

data_font.role: Numeric values, times, technical readouts, parameter deltas, activity details

hierarchy.page_titles: Large gradient or bright white headers with strong weight
hierarchy.labels: Muted uppercase or small explanatory text
hierarchy.metrics: Large mono numerals with tight spacing
hierarchy.meta_text: Small muted mono or muted sans

notable_patterns: Titles often use gradient text from white to muted gray or cyan-blue for brand emphasis.
Numbers are intentionally oversized versus labels, reinforcing portfolio and PnL importance.
Uppercase micro-labels are used for categories, status, and analytical context.

spacing_and_shape.component_spacing: Panels usually use 1.5rem to 2.5rem internal padding
shape_language: Occasional left-edge status bars on cards

background_treatment.motion: Slow pulsing scale animation on the background glow

materials_and_depth.depth_strategy: Depth is communicated through blur, translucency, glows, and border contrast more than through large drop shadows.

global_structure.header: Sticky top bar with brand left and utility actions right
global_structure.main: Wide content canvas with optional right sidebar
global_structure.sidebar: Persistent activity log, fixed width around 400px

behavior.activity_log_toggle: Sidebar can be shown or hidden from the header
behavior.dashboard_split: Primary data left, real-time feed right

page_patterns.dashboard: Hero KPI row, large chart, lower data modules
page_patterns.positions: Action form first, then live table, then historical table
page_patterns.ai_proposals: Filter bands followed by stacked review cards
page_patterns.settings: Tabbed configuration workspace with dense controls

tab_style.default: Muted text on translucent dark surface
tab_style.active: Cyan border, cyan text, soft glow, tinted fill

navigation.navigation_impression: Feels like mode switching inside a control room rather than browsing between pages

elements: Connection state pill with glowing status dot

glass_panel.description: Core container used across almost every screen

stat_cards.description: KPI cards for balance, position value, and PnL
features: Special highlighted card for more important metric

hero_badges.description: Large glowing count/value boxes used for total assets and active trades

buttons.primary: Cyan-blue gradient fill, dark text, bold weight, hover lift
buttons.outline_live: Transparent fill with cyan border and cyan text
buttons.danger: Pink-red outline/fill states for destructive actions
buttons.status_pill: Used heavily for filters, toggles, and live states

tables.style: Soft-card rows instead of strict grid lines
features: Row spacing via separate border collapse

activity_log.description: The strongest bespoke component in the app
features: Scrolling marquee for long event titles
Category-coded badges for trade, analysis, system, error
activity_log.impression: Feels like a mission feed or event console

chart.style: Cyan line with soft cyan-to-blue gradient fill

custom_select.style: Dark trigger with subtle border and cyan hover state
custom_select.dropdown: Dark floating list with selected option highlighted by cyan border-left
custom_select.motion: Quick fade/slide dropdown animation and rotating arrow

modal.style: Dim overlay with glass panel content
modal.usage: Drill-down analysis details from the market scanner

forms.style: Dark inset fields with faint borders and cyan focus ring

patterns: Hover lift on pills and buttons
Small horizontal hover shift on list items
motion.motion_feel: The interface feels alive, but not playful; animations support real-time system awareness.

data_visualization.approach: UI treats market data as premium information and gives metrics room to breathe
patterns: Oversized totals at top of pages
Mono formatting for trust and readability
Dense activity feed as narrative layer

dashboard.feel: Balanced and premium, with the strongest overview storytelling

llm_config.feel: Simple, functional, aligned with the global glass system

responsive_behavior.tablet: Bottom-grid collapses to one column at narrower widths
mobile_risk: Wide tables likely require horizontal scrolling
Persistent sidebar model may become cramped
Some inline styles in scanner and modal suggest desktop-first composition
responsive_behavior.overall_assessment: The visual system itself is adaptable, but the information architecture is clearly optimized for desktop monitoring.

realtime_feedback: Scanner updates from analysis activity logs
Run Analysis button exposes active/running state
decision_support: AI proposals framed as parameter diffs
Badges and colors reduce parsing time
Activity log creates narrative context around automated behavior
ux_patterns.workflow_bias: The app favors monitoring and validating bot behavior rather than manual chart analysis

strengths: Strong contrast between background and primary text
Multiple state cues beyond text alone in some areas, such as color plus border plus glow
risks: Muted secondary text may be too dim in smaller sizes
Heavy reliance on color for some financial states
Some buttons and controls use div-like custom behavior without obvious keyboard affordances
Marquee-style moving text in activity feed may impact readability for some users

visual_strengths: Very cohesive color and material system across pages
Strong differentiation between UI text and machine/data text through font pairing
Activity log is visually distinctive and gives the product a live operations identity
Metric hierarchy is clear and effective
The app looks purpose-built for trading rather than like a generic admin template
visual_weaknesses: A lot of inline styling exists beside the tokenized CSS system, which can fragment consistency over time
Settings styles appear to have grown incrementally and include duplicated or overlapping CSS blocks
Some sections are polished at a higher level than others, especially dashboard versus utility forms
The cyan accent is strong and effective but sometimes overused, reducing hierarchy between primary and secondary emphasis

code_level: Design tokens exist, but some component styling is hard-coded inline instead of token-driven.
There are repeated or appended style blocks in `frontend/src/styles/theme.css`, especially around backtest UI.
Some utility classes are improvised within the main stylesheet rather than organized into a clear system.
visual_level: Dashboard feels the most refined; settings and modal detail views feel more utilitarian.
Some chips use full glow while others use flatter bordered pills, creating small variations in emphasis logic.
Data-dense pages remain coherent, but spacing rhythm is less consistent in longer configuration screens.

keep: Deep dark background with cyan-led accent language
Mono diff blocks for technical changes
Live-state badges and subtle system motion
avoid: Switching to a flat generic admin dashboard look
Replacing mono numerics with standard sans everywhere
Removing the sidebar activity feed without an equally strong live event metaphor
Adding many unrelated accent colors that dilute the terminal-like identity
evolve_next: Normalize all visual values around tokens and reusable component variants
Unify settings, modal, and dashboard patterns under a tighter component spec
Refine mobile behavior for tables, sidebar collapse, and dense controls
Introduce a clearer emphasis ladder between primary action cyan, informational blue, and decorative glow

component_inventory: Weight sliders and backtest progress bars
